key.name: import-remember
key.description: When true, gcheckers stores import credentials for BoardGameArena.

key.name: import-email
key.description: Email used for BoardGameArena import when remember is enabled.

key.name: import-password
key.description: Password used for BoardGameArena import when remember is enabled.

key.name: sgf-last-folder
key.description: Most recently used folder for loading and saving SGF files.
